Peter, **In 30 days, we must elect a House of Representatives that represents the majority of the American people**. **Our democracy depends on it.** Through this campaign, I've learned that the vast majority of the Texas 10th wants universal healthcare. We want to strengthen Social Security. We value public education. We want to keep immigrant families together.
**[Let's bring the people's concerns to Congress. Contribute $20 today to power this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2519488/14695458/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDc3ZGVjNi0zZGNhLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RsY5tCoJHF7QytSMPFX4peqea3mfbnswN6NUAMoTnqs=)** Because of flaws in our political system, however, the majority of the people are not being heard in the Senate, in the White House, or in the Supreme Court.

**We are working to change this system right now.** In Texas, we have record voter registration. Thousands of people are engaged in the electoral process, many of whom were never involved before. One election will not solve the crisis we are facing, of course. We need to build a movement across every sector of America, to fight for working people and families, for tolerance and opportunity, for justice and equality. But the November vote will be a critical turning point.
**The House of Representatives can protect us from the worst of this Administration.** With even one branch of government under Democratic control, we can maintain essential aspects of the safety net. We can impose accountability on an out-of-control presidency.
We must all dig deep in the weeks ahead, to make sure this happens. **[Please contribute today to make sure we can get out every Democratic voter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2519489/14695459/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDc3ZGVjNi0zZGNhLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RsY5tCoJHF7QytSMPFX4peqea3mfbnswN6NUAMoTnqs=) **
Let's keep fighting, y'all! With love and respect,
Mike

name: Team Kaine
subject: A lifetime appointment.

body:
| | Derek:

Senate Republicans have confirmed Judge Brett Kavanaugh to a lifetime appointment on the Supreme Court, where he will be Justice Brett Kavanaugh. In this position on the highest court in our country, he will have the chance to shape the laws that guide our lives.

Like so many of you, we are extremely disappointed by this confirmation. Putting aside grave concerns around Judge Kavanaugh's inability - or unwillingness - to serve as an independent check on the executive and his troubling views on issues like health care and women's reproductive freedom, the multiple serious allegations of sexual assault and misconduct against him, and the way he responded to them, raise grave concerns about Kavanaugh's character. _Unfortunately, Republicans have sent a message that they simply don't care._

[We're worried. We're upset. And we're angry. Now, it's up to us to channel those feelings into action. Less than one month from today, Virginians have the opportunity to take our energy directly to the ballot box and make sure Republicans know that their actions have consequences.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1062/3e0906/76cb3826/3e37a688/298432309/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october?refcode=20181007_1_FR_TEAM_kavanaugh&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Were+worried+Were+upset+And+were+angry+N&utm_campaign=20181007_1_FR_TEAM_kavanaugh&source=20181007_1_FR_TEAM_kavanaugh")

Here on Team Kaine, we're working hard every single day to not only hold on to Tim's Senate seat - keeping it far out of reach of the extreme, pro-Trump grip of Corey Stewart - but also to flip deep red House seats over to Democratic control. Together we have the power to elect strong Democrats - leaders we can be proud of, who will fight for our values and respect all those they represent.

**But we can't do that without your support.** [Click here to make sure Democrats are ready to make a real statement on November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1062/3e0906/76cb3826/3e37a68f/298432309/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october?refcode=20181007_1_FR_TEAM_kavanaugh&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+make+sure+Democrats+are+re&utm_campaign=20181007_1_FR_TEAM_kavanaugh&source=20181007_1_FR_TEAM_kavanaugh")

subject: Changing hearts and minds...
body:
** Our team is hard at work!
------------------------------------------------------------
With everything that is going on in Washington, it is more critical than ever that our team work as hard as possible to get Ian elected this November. That is why our staff has been putting in extra effort to make phone calls and organize volunteers.

The good news is that it is making a difference. Every day I hear stories from our team about the people they talk to and what their thoughts are for the elections this year. Many people are upset with the direction things are going and are looking for a change, so even lifelong republicans re having conversations with our volunteers with an open mind.

We can't keep up all of this work without your support, however. We need to keep printing lit for volunteers and running ads to spread the word. You can help us change hearts and minds across the district by donating today! Peter --

This **Tuesday, October 9th, is the deadline to register to vote** in Indiana's midterm election, and [**even if you 're a regular voter, please double check your voter registration status!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2de6/7377f838/3923db21/51f8e4e8/2964327006/VEsE/ "https://indianavoters.in.gov/")

This year's midterms are too important to sit out. In the last midterm election, Indiana was dead last in voter turnout. We can and must do better. There is too much on the line this election -- health care, voting rights, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and so much more.

[**With only two days left before the deadline, don 't forget to make sure you're registered so you can make your voice heard on November 6th!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2de6/7377f838/3923db21/51f8e4e8/2964327006/VEsF/ "https://indianavoters.in.gov/")

name: Walter Mondale
subject: Thank you, Amy Klobuchar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Like many of you, I have been glued to the television, watching a scene unfold in Washington that struck me to my core. Our whole country heard the testimony of a brave citizen guided by civic duty, saw the blind partisanship of politics in Washington, and felt the immense pressure of this moment in our nation's history.

We also saw my former college intern -- and later law firm colleague and friend -- Senator Amy Klobuchar, buck the grandstanding and make a difference through not only the clarity and power of her arguments, but also the strength of her convictions.

"Where is the bravery in this room?" she asked.

When I served in the Senate we faced big tests too. During Watergate I saw firsthand the damage a leader can do to our democracy when he puts his party and ambitions before the people.

But Amy took a different tact.

It will take a lot of work from leaders like Amy, and citizens like you and me, to bring our nation back to a sense of decency and dignity. While this nomination process did not end with the result that many of us hoped, it made clear just how high the stakes truly are.

This is not a time to back down. **We need Amy 's voice in the Senate now more than ever.**

As Amy so eloquently said in her remarks to the Judiciary Committee, "The Constitution does not say, 'We the ruling party.' The Constitution says, 'We the people.'" Throughout this process, as she always has in the Senate, Amy spoke up firmly and resoundingly for the people.

I know I'm glad she's our Senator at this critical time.

**Let 's make sure she gets re-elected in November so she can keep fighting for us.** Please join me in supporting her re-election by making a contribution today.

subject: Our opponent let big internet companies sell your private data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: how we will reform our campaign finance system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Something has become clear to me over the past year, throughout this run for Congress: Our campaign finance system is deeply broken.
| | Peter, Something has become clear to me over the past year, throughout this run for Congress: **Our campaign finance system is deeply broken.** Too few Americans trust that their elected representatives are really working for them, rather than the wealthy donors funding their campaigns. Outside groups funded by special interests are free to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections, and they do -- to the tune of millions of dollars in a single race, with little transparency and no accountability to voters. We cannot afford to continue this broken status quo, **which is why I am honored to join more than 100 other House challenger candidates in calling for comprehensive campaign finance reform to be a top priority of the next Congress.** Among other important points, we are proposing greater disclosure requirements for political spending; stronger congressional ethics rules; and lobbying reform. Peter, now we are asking our supporters to join us in demanding #ReformFirst. [**Will you sign onto our petition, calling on the next Congress to take up legislation to address this broken system, first thing?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xbe3ZgGq7GIwL37glkgqyCMFQZpfFDVczPCNCh2dKFE=/StuUq_RxTZjyVHL9GSbb7p3zPHXJRqEdDzFBzohC1iU=?source=Spanberger&redirect_url=https%3A%2F%2Fsign.actiontaker.org%2FNew-Congress-Spanberger-AB) As a first-time candidate for public office, I've seen up front, in this race, how damaging an influx of big outside money can be to public discourse. We must all acknowledge the corrosive role money and special interests have played in shaking the American people's faith in our political system. clean_body: Something has become clear to me over the past year, throughout this run for Congress: Our campaign finance system is deeply broken. | | Peter, Something has become clear to me over the past year, throughout this run for Congress: Our campaign finance system is deeply broken. Too few Americans trust that their elected representatives are really working for them, rather than the wealthy donors funding their campaigns. Outside groups funded by special interests are free to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections, and they do -- to the tune of millions of dollars in a single race, with little transparency and no accountability to voters. We cannot afford to continue this broken status quo, which is why I am honored to join more than 100 other House challenger candidates in calling for comprehensive campaign finance reform to be a top priority of the next Congress. Among other important points, we are proposing greater disclosure requirements for political spending; stronger congressional ethics rules; and lobbying reform. Peter, now we are asking our supporters to join us in demanding #ReformFirst. As a first-time candidate for public office, I've seen up front, in this race, how damaging an influx of big outside money can be to public discourse. We must all acknowledge the corrosive role money and special interests have played in shaking the American people's faith in our political system. [1]Beto for Texas

Next weekend, October 13-14, is going to be our biggest weekend of action
for Beto ever. We’re setting a massive goal to knock on 102,733 doors and
make 102,733 phone calls to Texas voters. It’s going to take an incredible
amount of people power to get it done.

Thousands of Texans will be gathering across the state and hitting the
streets to make sure voters are prepared to vote, and I want to ask you
personally: can you join us?

Our team will help with logistics and training. It’s a lot to ask, but
having you here will make a difference.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20181007&t=1001&akid=16261%2E444211%2ExC4uk7 ]If you can join us in Texas to elect Beto, just fill out this form and
an organizer will contact you as soon as possible to sort out the details.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20181007&t=1002&akid=16261%2E444211%2ExC4uk7 ]Come back to Texas

If you can’t do it, don’t worry: you can still help unseat Ted Cruz and
elect Beto by gathering folks in your community to make calls to Texas
voters. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=em20181007&t=1003&akid=16261%2E444211%2ExC4uk7 ]Just sign up to host a phone bank, and we’ll get you all the
info and support you need.

There are huge numbers of Texans who say they will vote for Beto, but
there’s a real danger that they won’t actually turn out and vote when it
counts. That’s a risk we can’t afford to take. Person-to-person
conversations with voters is the best way to make sure they turn out.

We have already accomplished so much together, and for that I am deeply
grateful. But all of that won’t add up to a win if we don’t pull off the
final and most important part of the campaign. I can’t say it enough.

15 days until early voting begins. 30 days until Election Day. Let’s leave
no gas in the tank and make every day count.

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

P.S. Right now, we’re in our first weekend of the ‘get out the vote’
sprint. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=ema20181007&t=1004&akid=16261%2E444211%2ExC4uk7 ]If you can contribute to support our efforts on the ground,
please click here.

| | | October 7, 2018

Happy Sunday! Here's your weekly update from our campaign:
---
| **First, Leah has her first debate against Senator Baldwin tomorrow!** The debate will be held at the University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee. Be sure to catch the broadcast on TMJ4 or Wisconsin Eye.

This week, the whistleblower at the Tomah VA said it would be "immoral" to vote for Baldwin. Read the full article [here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyO0m4HylMfi7TWlTWwTouaY27wJ9ahuYpOZUjjX3dpapiOTQQruzjkLzprzPKohs3Nm5Q7SS7497gGsp4RmQ5reLoF2mNzECbhrIrxMHLBpxah6yBmD6PBJ9hZs_msTx4_LHxvdl91C0yGCj187hu2tKowWHo2rXAQi_G6z7RxTTePB7EqMG7TK0ZPwSwfAU_DAwUgM3HG7WfumpB4ue1Z0XgoygovqjDzrdgdqah2mVqfgk2tRiYMYPrdJ72g1CK_7pTxPsc3-qNvRude2jDHruxGLXZdYb3I-bnXJVSoE6zf_owaDlofvkbn9sWF5BQC_J52pVxYer_fej2n-cp2c-8j4c-_LpyaY-MrjEfuTs_masH5KyGtMeeecutIF88VmSS_7oMHWBj9LYLRBO5xk%3D).

**Have you read Leah's column on Fox News yet?** This week, Leah wrote a column about how the Democrat's outlash against Kavanaugh echoes the chaos in Wisconsin during Act 10. If you haven't had time to check it out yet, you can [here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyBoAHb9zlL7RlGznUd-AQcnL8jZpRrGaK74DCKAUrY-sp3azJJfF8FaTp2ZlG7Lc0m_EIh6WLmIGvodkLoHFK8O489E4K2NbzIGhmX9Epirb6tT0TClGFwiPtFoFnKUnhRUEN1B3_BHkGoTsQ9oMjJHnafI5cY41TOPMC_x4JebDGpplpkOooA4HfyLvkeQ-ZKsMh6Zua1B1wbUiJdA1AYQ2bM02aQ1h8eNbqfwBLcKcAukTxBaf4JKZneXIq7dXRupL-Z1mhLzHcj7EeWN54xKmh4N1R9sNc7IACfJ4irxQ6d9m1HK2Ow66NkfZhhtAVbuzIkgUcDKkPg8rUaBQYBFZR-HTqnE4iTs9vUC_aF5v).
---
| Leah began her week by meeting with voters at Oktoberfest in La Crosse. Later that day, Leah attended Fall Fest and spoke about the new enthusiasm among the WI Republican base. Check out Leah's remarks about Fall Fest [here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyO0m4HylMfi7TWlTWwTouaaLyLFab_l8z3FxizovB7j-L6K4mrufW41UZmyb2ljqteQgGq6jOT9DL3NQQV35x_RC8NazfIhwxZC78C8wd2_fAF0Cn3tqU_Y17bin3MMtCHucFLNKvd0UZO0SLiHVk3u5vnjN34WSl3QRvx6De1TzsdYwwz0DTDtXO1vfix5kSfT07MgniEn0PxH3yj8OGSVgDl8iXYjiBqvagtvaz2OL7ZFNrqpVMx_w1LrpT25YChFrp2Bj8XD0RqbzWy4NAwAfsmvMhZswLSg54CSMMKvn1uRWwtPihiPlctjsN6GZVVekHXEk3EnyTe-VTjG7GXrZRSRRPY4EItzSFcaL2-uM7hXhYig_5RkEdx2zhKP7sw%3D%3D).

---
|
---
---
| Early this week, Leah spoke to young conservatives at Ripon College and University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee.

Marine vet Devin Gatton was featured on [#50days50vets](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyPhDay_NglsuIJs0XkDDxttv3SsVnVW2JtdvWn84TptSNYWkRJBfLuD321ijzz0_As9oXQSGVbD4CqGbnCzEVtCbgyXrt4xohaKKOMqR9XBJpzblig0904zLS6jBQLZLwHhYvJ7rlgl24YSvM63U43G0Hu5Ob6OlNKyCfEB_0qpYsOAUK6I7asH4WGtEfTab4pAwozFEzeE64U9axy_r0wSW70pQDsEEZiLKl-WCyf18Yr1YP-7PEK43kuz1ZaYNJse0YCthaNDh3Fnl2hcOrUiUOZ5uScyIYyOoUxY12un5) this week. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyMwFXQQNzlEfCL22r7ZsuGJKNElyznPjAdYch6ZLETjYDPlKfXwZIL8qODHvhNkp1kxZG3z65vTisFLUH-ke5GfE5TWnO_p8PU2PFSyqYZqAVca4wl_P5czAYpB9FRaUlTbyxwR_IN41WQAYvgTRVBodxbhVRcf5s0tFzEpFoEaC3tzohw8KxzB2JIbw8JvWeOy5y2sgO0n1FN-PGO5TRF9s3PFWKAVuK-PHzAJECkuKKyvHto0bxMxqnSYF1IzM94kwC8FaKCcqs_c1XzEFlSs%3D) to listen to Devin explain why he's voting for Leah this November.

Leah also spoke to Milwaukee Rotary about how she plans to bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. [Watch](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=yEDLj-0xOftplTIwLroXpTab1SSFRL9jjZzhU836hs0TCpa8WJQ2wDmkWkUo5dvAAT-kT5Pru_1gt8vylEd1u6Sc0nZCcHhUeVNoCMnVFQDpUU8jIcO-oRlbMfsN2Hmfsvja5o61OjhJhTbg4xSZTTVIJVVMf0tcYU-p2ip-1WFx3v_zacq41otVl3FUVY1k0W9YJfwM7aCbbf8riTGTwAXC78pvrS8Pbp40S6nE4Us9aM92PiIq99QhEoeeISd2Gis4Aww2xkwP2RGp7jF80-X9AEfoqr8obn7C62OqwOqE77zxdO7ihbNDFuZ5xG_C) her remarks.

Leah finished up her week by sharing breakfast with Vietnam Vets at Solly’s Grille on Friday and making a couple stops in Northeast Wisconsin to energize volunteers!

## [Fox News: Kavanaugh madness echoes time when Democrats tried to take over my state with craziness](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyBoAHb9zlL7RlGznUd-AQcnL8jZpRrGaK74DCKAUrY-sp3azJJfF8FaTp2ZlG7Lc0m_EIh6WLmIGvodkLoHFK8O489E4K2NbzIGhmX9Epirb6tT0TClGFwiPtFoFnKUnhRUEN1B3_BHkGoTsQ9oMjJE5gNvXAMNk5fwuk6ukNRVmufXhqEzlQc3ieZU3L685LZbXfQqUN08MiFoELXuJj103MQNUMZNEVzguXmOVcZWsk1QI-fKhceiOh4WwjfHKwMU3x7-N_QUj1kpcF2FmCVTTjSoLW9wTJh4Dsb9nHsHrNL1EZXwhx0DfKMehUuJqWfVkP0s3V3ghzUIf6QpelfPE17uJCKxPiYX6H9kAnJRS)
But what we’re seeing today with the Kavanaugh nomination are the same intimidation schemes those on the left implements whenever their ideas don’t win at the ballot box.

Years ago I joked that I wanted to take Iron Lady Margaret Thatcher’s idea of starting a “rent a spine” business. But right now, it looks like Washington just needs more people like me to take their spines to the halls of the U.S. Senate. I won’t buckle, and I will force other weak-kneed elected officials to buck up, do the right thing, and ignore the absurd shenanigans of the extreme left.
## [Milwaukee Journal Sentinel: Tomah VA whistleblower says it would be 'immoral' to support Sen. Tammy Baldwin](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=47131c0ba39b465cb8781ae142838b5f&_e=8Snx5_qn9bj3RvaI8aIIyO0m4HylMfi7TWlTWwTouaY27wJ9ahuYpOZUjjX3dpapiOTQQruzjkLzprzPKohs3Nm5Q7SS7497gGsp4RmQ5reLoF2mNzECbhrIrxMHLBpxah6yBmD6PBJ9hZs_msTx4_LHxvdl91C0yGCj187hu2tKowWHo2rXAQi_G6z7RxTTePB7EqMG7TK0ZPwSwfAU_ERrs-1_5HnKSgokdHlEXSnsrpD1z8qWgMNSMm2XEsulSX9iYx_ZvzhnS45YrpPKZB7tzaciHRPQ4ZtYznx4kKwuJA6yl-jhYsFKWVD31nZlIKbxmyNtgliW0R8nQBv3ia3d91bEkrXKWDX-yCQOfzdW08fsNTXvGMffzYXyzFM4pmQcdhCNWD-sp8s8UbgOT6LJjUm1_bua3d5UEDp25Nk%3D)
Honl, who helped shine the spotlight on the problems at the Tomah Veterans Affairs Medical Center, is urging voters to oppose Democratic U.S. Sen. Tammy Baldwin. She is being challenged by GOP state Sen. Leah Vukmir. "It is immoral to vote for Tammy Baldwin in this year's election," Honl, a 46-year-old Gulf War veteran and West Point graduate, said in a statement to the Journal Sentinel. Honl's intervention in the race caused a stir in the two campaigns, with Vukmir saluting his remarks while Baldwin all but dismissed them.
